---
title: "Psychologie et délinquance"
description: |
  Bienvenue sur ce blog consacré au lien entre la psychologie et la délinquance. Il est tenu par Benjamin Thiry.
author:
  - name: Benjamin Thiry 
    url: https://benjaminthiry.netlify.app/
    affiliation: Mons University
    date: 08-03-2021
output:
  distill::distill_article:
    self_contained: false
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE)

# Learn more about creating blogs with Distill at:
# https://rstudio.github.io/distill/blog.html

```
